member.name: T:Utx.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: Classe di risorse fortemente tipizzata per la ricerca di stringhe localizzate e così via.

member.name: P:Utx.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Restituisce l'istanza di ResourceManager nella cache utilizzata da questa classe.

member.name: P:Utx.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Esegue l'override della proprietà CurrentUICulture del thread corrente per tutte le ricerche di risorse eseguite utilizzando questa classe di risorse fortemente tipizzata.

member.name: P:Utx.My.Resources.Resources.ScriptDataBase
member.summary: Cerca una stringa localizzata simile a <script name="creazione database"> <database tipo="agenzia"> <sql operazione="drop"> IF EXISTS (SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name = N'DB{agenzia}') DROP DATABASE DBagenzia</sql> <sql operazione="use">USE MASTER</sql> <sql operazione="use">USE DB{agenzia}</sql> <sql operazione="set">ALTER DATABASE [DBagenzia] SET AUTO_CLOSE OFF</sql> <sql operazione="create"> CREATE DATABASE DB{agenzia} ON ( NAME = DB{agenzia}, FILENAME = '{pat [stringa troncata]";.

member.name: M:Utx.ApplicationLog.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Istanzia classe per la creazione di un log dell'applicazione
member.param: Nome del file di log senza path (cartella logs predefinita)

member.name: M:Utx.ConnessioniDb.PathMdb(Utx.ConnessioniDb.Db)
member.summary: Full path database per l'agenzia selezionata

member.name: M:Utx.ConnessioniDb.PathMdbAgenzia(System.String,Utx.ConnessioniDb.Db)
member.summary: Full path del database per il codice agenzia

member.summary: Crea un timeout personalizzato

member.summary: visualizza una notifica rapida
member.param: ritardo per la chiusura della notifica in secondi

member.name: T:Utx.PowerManager
member.summary: Simple power manager class that enables applications to inform the system that it is in use, thereby preventing the system from entering the sleeping power state or turning off the display while the application is running.

member.name: M:Utx.PowerManager.SetThreadExecutionState(Utx.PowerManager.EXECUTION_STATE)
member.summary: Enables applications to inform the system that it is in use, thereby preventing the system from entering the sleeping power state or turning off the display while the application is running.
member.param: The thread's execution requirements. This parameter can be one or more of the EXECUTION_STATE values.

returns.para: If the function succeeds, the return value is the previous thread execution state, as a EXECUTION_STATE value.
If the function fails, the return value is NULL.

remarks.para: This function does not stop the screen saver from executing.

member.name: F:Utx.PowerManager.EXECUTION_STATE.ES_CONTINUOUS
member.summary: Informs the system that the state being set should remain in effect until the next call that uses ES_CONTINUOUS and one of the other state flags is cleared.

member.name: F:Utx.PowerManager.EXECUTION_STATE.ES_DISPLAY_REQUIRED
member.summary: Forces the display to be on by resetting the display idle timer.

member.name: F:Utx.PowerManager.EXECUTION_STATE.ES_SYSTEM_REQUIRED
member.summary: Forces the system to be in the working state by resetting the system idle timer.

member.name: M:Utx.SIA.InviaFilePN(System.String)
member.summary: Invio file prima nota a SIA
member.param: path completo del file da inviare

member.name: M:Utx.SIA.InviaFileMA(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Invio file MA a SIA
member.param: path completo del file da inviare

member.name: M:Utx.SIA.InviaPacchettoEssigReti(System.String)
member.summary: Invio file zip essig reti a SIA
member.param: path completo del file da inviare

member.name: M:Utx.Utente.UtenteGestito(System.String)
member.summary: controlla se l'utente appartiene a uno dei codici gestiti
